name: Julia Merti
bio: Julia ('24) was the Program Assistant for MCP and graduated with a Bachelor of Science in Physics-EPAD.

name: Min Kim
bio: Min ('24) was the web developer for MCP. He graduated with a degree Computer Science and Economics at W&M.

name: Sophia Chen
bio: Sophia ('24) was the social media designer and PR coordinator for MCP. She studied Data Science at W&M.

name: Piero Panariello
bio: Piero ('23) was the formal web developer for MCP. He is studying computer science at W&M and works part-time for NASA.

name: Adi de la Guardia
bio: Adi ('23) was the formal Director of Public Relations for MCP. She is a physics-EPAD major and Art minor.

name: Carson Stillman
bio: Former MCP program assistant. Carson is in the Ph.D. program of the Computer Information Sciences and Engineering department at the University of Florida.

name: Jason LaPierre
bio: Jason ('25) was one of the former MCP web developers. He graduated with a B.S in Biology and a minor in Computer Science.

name: Georgia Stone
bio: I am very grateful to be a part of this community of women in physics, and am passionate about working towards uplifting fellow women in the field! I am planning to pursue an engineering masters degree, potentially in Mechanical Engineering.
